message:
refactor(search): simplify scorer index building and synonym expansion

- Replace the IIFE that built the tags field in buildScorerIndex with a
  plain object literal. The tag tokens are now computed once beforehand
  and referenced directly, making the mapping callback easier to read
  with no behavioral change.

- In searchScorerIndex, remove the redundant Set wrapper around
  expandQuery results. expandQuery already returns unique tokens via its
  internal deduplication, so the extra allocation was unnecessary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
